title: propertyPoint operation
description: Single-point property evaluation: at a given (T, P, composition) the thermo package reports every property the chosen models can compute (Psat, gamma_i, K_i, Cp_ig, H, S, Z, v, ...). Results print to the run log.

state.title: Thermodynamic state
state.description: The (T, P, composition) at which properties are evaluated.
